name: Discover it Student Cash Back
signup_bonus: Unlimited Cashback Match for first year
perks: Cashback Match - Discover doubles all cash back earned in first year
5% on rotating quarterly categories (up to $1,500 per quarter) such as groceries, gas, restaurants, and Amazon
Free FICO credit score on monthly statements
No penalty APR for late payments
Good Grade Reward - $20 statement credit each year GPA is 3.0 or higher
drawbacks: Rotating categories capped at $1,500 per quarter
Must be enrolled in a 2 or 4 year college to qualify
Discover accepted less widely internationally than Visa or Mastercard
